name: Ask Concentration Z-Score Contra (Final Tightening)
hypothesis: The parent spec is the current top performer (+7.60 bps). As per feedback, a final tightening of the z-score threshold from 5.0 to 5.5 will test the absolute conviction limit of the 'ask wall pressure' signal, potentially increasing expectancy further before diminishing returns fully set in.
mutation_note: Tightened threshold from 5.0 to 5.5 based on feedback to find the signal's peak conviction.
